Over Three Decades of Excellence in Freight Forwarding

We are always there to help your business with supply chain and logistics. Hence, we are most notably known by our clients as an End-to-End Logistics Partner.

Experience

Over 33 years of experience as a leading freight forwarder company trusted by numerous multinational companies.

Global Network

We have global reach to over 67 countries, connecting your business to opportunities around the world.

Flexible and Agile

Our ability to pivot and cater to ever-changing demands ensures your cargo reaches its destination seamlessly.

Over Three Decades of Excellence in Freight Forwarding

We are always there to help your business with supply chain and logistics. Hence, we are most notably known by our clients as an End-to-End Logistics Partner.

Experience

Over 33 years of experience as a leading freight forwarder company trusted by numerous multinational companies.

Global Network

We have global reach to over 67 countries, connecting your business to opportunities around the world.

Flexible and Agile

Our ability to pivot and cater to ever-changing demands ensures your cargo reaches its destination seamlessly.

Uniair Cargo’s Services

Our wide range of services cater to your business specific needs. Reliable whenever and wherever needed.

Air Freight Forwarding

For time-sensitive delivery.

Ocean Freight Forwarding

For cost-conscious businesses.

Customs
Clearance

Ease up the customs process in Indonesia.

Trucking
Warehousing
Distribution

Comprehensive logistics for your business.

Cargo Insurance Brokerage

We give you peace of mind, don’t worry about accidental damages.

Courier Services

Seamless urgent transportation to anywhere in Indonesia.

Multimodal Transportation

Combine air freight with ocean freight to save tons of money.

Value Added Services

Additional services to complete our range as logistics provider.

We Worked Across Different Industry Verticals

In a different industry? We handled dozens of industries and likely have experience with your products.
Contact us now to get personalized solutions for your business.

Aerospace

Chemical

Construction

Cosmetics

Energy

Electronics

Food and Beverage

Industrial

Plastics and Rubber

Retail

Semiconductor

Global Network : Empowering Your International Trade Journey

In the dynamic realm of international trade, trust and efficiency are the keys to success. At Uniair Cargo, we take these principles to heart. A vast global network for your business with a strong focus on the Asia Pacific region.

Our Clients

Our Clients

Get tailored solutions for all your logistics challenge.

Consult with us today

03 June 2025

Panduan Lengkap Cara Impor Barang dari China

Pelajari langkah-langkah lengkap cara impor barang dari China, mulai dari riset supplier, proses bea cukai, hingga pengiriman. Cocok untuk pemula maupun pebisnis berpengalaman.

Read More

03 June 2025

26 May 2025

Recent Blog

06 October 2019

Bea dan Cukai Tunjuk Uniair Indotama Cargo sebagai PLB e-Commerce Pertama Indonesia

Direktorat Jenderal Bea dan Cukai secara resmi telah menunjuk PT Uniair Indotama Cargo, sebagai perusahaan yang dapat melakukan jasa Pusat Logistik Berikat e-commerce (PLB-e) yang pertama beroperasi di Indonesia.

Read More

17 February 2023

7 Tips Sebelum Anda Sewa Gudang dan Manfaat Outsourcing Warehouse

Outsourcing perihal pergudangan atau warehouse bisa menjadi langkah yang tepat bagi bisnis Anda baik untuk perusahaan startup maupun perusahaan multionasional.

Read More

30 March 2023

Apa Itu Pusat Logistik Berikat (PLB)?

Pusat Logistik Berikat (PLB) adalah sebuah fasilitas yang digunakan untuk penyimpanan, pengolahan, dan distribusi

Read More

31 December 2024

Apa Saja Standar Internasional yang Harus Diikuti dalam Pelabelan Barang?

Pelabelan barang penting dalam perdagangan internasional untuk memberikan informasi dan memastikan kepatuhan terhadap standar serta peraturan di berbagai negara.

Read More

28 February 2025

Apa Saja Regulasi dan Pajak Impor Barang Ramadan dan Bagaimana Menghindari Keterlambatan di Bea Cukai?

Impor barang Ramadan memerlukan pemahaman regulasi dan pajak untuk menghindari keterlambatan. Artikel ini membahas aturan impor dan strategi pengiriman tepat waktu.
